Agency-managed merchandising (Nestlé, etc.) at retail level Feedback: traceability issues in current process Example: 10K diapers via third-party merchandise Supervisor limitations and control gaps Trust issues in product traceability and merchandising Existing systems can be manipulated (>1% value leakage) Retailers delay payments; seller bears risk Manual delivery challans Proposal: automated system for merchandising Agency operates on labor fee model → trust gap
